title: Floral Light Japanese Gelatin Crumble
description: A paleo-friendly dessert featuring floral-flavored gelatin that showcases a light and airy texture achieved through air-frying.
instructions: Dissolve the gelatin in 1 cup of water and let it cool.
Add pomegranate syrup into the cooled gelatin mixture and stir well until fully combined.
Fold in almond meal gradually until you get a crumbly texture.
Gently fold in coconut flakes for additional texture and flavor.
Transfer the mixture onto an air fryer-safe baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Sprinkle more almond meal on top to create visible ridges, if desired.
Air fry for about 5-7 minutes or until golden brown. Keep a close eye as it can go from caramelized and crisp to burnt quickly.
Let the dessert cool down before serving to ensure best texture.
